title: Solana ETFs Attract Significant Inflows Amid Market Challenges
description: According to Cointelegraph, Solana (SOL) exchange-traded funds (ETFs) have experienced a consistent inflow streak over seven days, despite the cryptocurrency's declining price and a broader downturn in the crypto market. On Tuesday, the inflows peaked with approximately $16. 6 million directed into SOL ETFs, as reported by investment management firm Farside Investors. This brings the total net inflow into SOL ETFs to $674 million at the time of writing, based on Farside's data

This brings the total net inflow into SOL ETFs to $674 million at the time of writing, based on Farside's data

title: AI predicts XRP price if ETF inflows will hit $10 billion
description: XRP exchange-traded funds (ETF) are posting one of the fastest adoption rates seen in the cryptocurrency ETF market, with cumulative inflows nearing $1 billion within just three to four weeks of launch. The pace exceeds early inflow trends recorded by Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) ETFs, signaling strong institutional appetite for XRP-linked investment products. Flow data shows inflows have remained consistently positive, with no notable net outflows reported so far. Meanwhile, XRP has continued to trade near the $2 level, a key psychological zone

title: JPMorgan Boss Favors Kevin Warsh As Next Fed Chair
description: JPMorgan Chief Executive Officer Jamie Dimon signaled support for former Federal Reserve ​Governor Kevin Warsh as the next ‌Fed Chair.
text: JPMorgan Boss Favors Kevin Warsh As Next Fed Chair. JPMorgan Chief Executive Officer Jamie Dimon signaled support for former Federal Reserve ​Governor Kevin Warsh as the next ‌Fed Chair.

title: AI predicts XRP price if ETF inflows will hit $10 billion
description: XRP exchange-traded funds (ETF) are posting one of the fastest adoption rates seen in the cryptocurrency ETF market, with cumulative inflows nearing $1 billion within just three to four weeks of launch. The pace exceeds early inflow trends recorded by Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum (ETH) ETFs, signaling strong institutional appetite for XRP-linked investment products. Flow data shows inflows have remained consistently positive, with no notable net outflows reported so far. Meanwhile, XRP has continued to trade near the $2 level, a key psychological zone

title: Michael Saylor's Strategy Hangs on to Spot in Nasdaq 100 Index
description: Michael Saylor's innovative investment strategy has successfully maintained its position within the prestigious Nasdaq 100 Index, demonstrating resilience and adaptability in a rapidly changing market environment.

title: LATEST:  Netflix has revealed that Jennifer Garner will star in a new crypto-themed comedy called "One Attempt Remaining" about a divorced couple trying to track down the password for an old crypto account now worth millions.
Brazil’s Biggest Bank Recommends Bitcoin Allocation of Up to 3%
description: Itaú Unibanco, the largest private bank in Brazil and all of Latin America, has taken another major step toward institutional crypto adoption by formally recommending that clients allocate a portion of their portfolios to Bitcoin. The guidance comes from Itaú Asset, the bank’s asset management arm overseeing roughly $185 billion in assets.
text: Brazil’s Biggest Bank Recommends Bitcoin Allocation of Up to 3%. Itaú Unibanco, the largest private bank in Brazil and all of Latin America, has taken another major step toward institutional crypto adoption by formally recommending that clients allocate a portion of their portfolios to Bitcoin. The guidance comes from Itaú Asset, the bank’s asset management arm overseeing roughly $185 billion in assets.
